Sandbox_WDecay_ReadPlease_tooltip: Please read the mod description for full feature details
Sandbox_WDecay_timeBudgetMs_tooltip: Maximum milliseconds per frame for world generation. Lower = smoother FPS but slower generation. Higher = faster generation but possible lag spikes.
Sandbox_WDecay_scanInterval_tooltip: How often the mod scans for new chunks around the player. Lower = more responsive but higher CPU usage. In Multiplayer, this value is automatically doubled.
Sandbox_WDecay_scanRadius_tooltip: How many chunks away from the player are scanned for processing. Higher = more area covered but more chunks queued at once.
Sandbox_WDecay_priorityRadius_tooltip: Chunks within this distance from the player are processed first with high priority.
Sandbox_WDecay_debugMode_tooltip: Enables detailed logging to the console. Only useful for troubleshooting or mod development.
Sandbox_WDecay_treePercentage_tooltip: How many trees with random foliage spawn on natural ground.
Sandbox_WDecay_treePercentageOnRoad_tool: How many trees spawn on roads and pavement.
Sandbox_WDecay_roadCrackOverlayPercentag: How many cracked overlays appear on road tiles.
Sandbox_WDecay_dirtCrackOverlayPercentag: How many cracked overlays appear on natural ground tiles.
Sandbox_WDecay_vinePercentage_tooltip: How much ivy and vines grow on exterior walls and fences.
Sandbox_WDecay_multiFloorVines_tooltip: If enabled, vines also grow on upper floor walls. Disabled by default.
Sandbox_WDecay_vinesExteriorOnly_tooltip: If enabled, vines only grow on exterior squares. Disable to allow vines inside buildings. Enabled by default.
Sandbox_WDecay_vinesOnWalls_tooltip: If enabled, vines grow on exterior walls. Disable to prevent vines on building walls.
Sandbox_WDecay_vinesOnFences_tooltip: If enabled, vines grow on fences and railings. Disable to prevent vines on fences.
Sandbox_WDecay_trashPercentage_tooltip: How much decorative trash (non-lootable) scatters on the ground.
Sandbox_WDecay_trashPercentageOnRoad_too: How much decorative trash appears on roads and streets.
Sandbox_WDecay_barricadePercentage_toolt: How many windows and exterior doors receive barricades. Random 1-4 wooden planks or metal sheets.
Sandbox_WDecay_wallPercentage_tooltip: How many exterior wooden walls are replaced with burnt/damaged variants. Excludes doors and windows.
Sandbox_WDecay_vehicleRarity_tooltip: How often abandoned, rusted vehicles with blood stains spawn on roads.
Sandbox_WDecay_storiesRarity_tooltip: How often environmental story zones (camps, survivor scenes) spawn in natural areas.
Sandbox_WDecay_grassPercentage_tooltip: How much vanilla grass spawns on natural ground.
Sandbox_WDecay_grassPercentageOnRoad_too: How much vanilla grass spawns on road tiles.
Sandbox_WDecay_customGrassPercentage_too: How much custom grass and ground debris (leaves, twigs, stones, logs) spawns.
Sandbox_WDecay_customGrassPercentageOnRo: How much custom grass and debris spawns on road tiles.
Sandbox_WDecay_roofPercentage_tooltip: How many roofs on upper floors are destroyed, with 80% chance of replacing with a destroyed variant.
Sandbox_WDecay_roofGrassPercentage_toolt: How much vanilla grass spawns on roof tiles (Z > 1).
Sandbox_WDecay_roofCustomGrassPercentage: How much custom grass and debris spawns on roof tiles (Z > 1).
Sandbox_WDecay_bushesPercentage_tooltip: How many custom bushes and hedges spawn on natural ground.
Sandbox_WDecay_bushesPercentageOnRoad_to: How many bushes spawn on road tiles.
Sandbox_WDecay_destroyedDoorsPercentage_: How many exterior doors are destroyed.
Sandbox_WDecay_fencePercentage_tooltip: Base chance for fences to be damaged. Used as fallback when Break Chance or Bend Chance is set to 0.
Sandbox_WDecay_fenceBreakChance_tooltip: Override chance for single-tile breakable fences (wood, metal bars, short chainlink). Set to 0 to use the base Fence Percentage.
Sandbox_WDecay_fenceBendChance_tooltip: Override chance for multi-tile bendable fences (tall chainlink, metal dividers, tall wood). Set to 0 to use the base Fence Percentage.
Sandbox_WDecay_fenceDestroyWeight_toolti: When a breakable fence is damaged, the chance (weight) it gets fully destroyed vs partially damaged. Higher = more destruction.
Sandbox_WDecay_fenceBendSeverity_tooltip: How severely bent fences become. Random picks any stage equally. Light always stage 1, Medium stage 2, Heavy stage 3.
Sandbox_WDecay_indoorGrassPercentage_too: How much grass and overgrowth spawns inside buildings on floor tiles.
Sandbox_WDecay_indoorBushesPercentage_to: How many bushes spawn inside buildings on floor tiles.
Sandbox_WDecay_enableLegacyOverlays_tool: Enables the legacy tile overlay system for additional vegetation coverage. Disabled by default.
